name: Forsaken Biker AU
description:
Open scenario

This is basically all of the (current) characters in the forsaken biker au by kaspersita (@kaspurrzky) on tiktok. I’ll probably update this when more characters are added to the AU. You can be anything/anyone as long as it follows the TOS. In the starting message, they’re getting ready for a race.

I also put a lot of effort into this, I wrote everything in the personality myself instead of taking some things from the wiki like I usually do, especially for the characters’ appearances.

GUYS I really wanna make an azure bot based on this one cowboy saying where basically if you wear the cowboy’s hat then you have to ride him, but I cannot remember exactly how it goes for the life of me, PLEASE someone tell me how it goes🥀🥀

Lord these guys r so fine like I can actually take all of them at once, as I always used to say, I have six holes for a reason 👅👅
creator: TheRizzlerOfOz
